---
title: "Min Max Seo"
image: profile_pic.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:mseo011231@gmail.com
    - text: CV
      icon: file-earmark-pdf
      href: https://min-max-seo.github.io/website/cv.pdf
---

Welcome to my personal website. My name is Min (they/he) and I am a graduate student in the Faculty of Education at Ontario Tech University, studying mathematics education. You can find links to my personal email address and CV below.
